title: LONBET 100L Laundry Basket with Lid and Sturdy Bamboo Frame - Aesthetic Laundry Hamper with Side Handles and Made from Breathable Fabric - Laundry Bin with Removable Bag, Clothes Basket Grey
features: STYLISH HARMONY OF BAMBOO AND FABRIC: Elevate your space with our meticulously designed laundry basket, seamlessly merging bamboo's strength with fabric's refined touch. Striking a perfect balance between style and functionality, this contemporary piece enhances any room's elegance with a timeless allure.

ELEGANCE IN EVERY DETAIL: This lightweight laundry basket with lid is perfect for placement in various spaces such as the bedroom or bathroom. Its elegant design and covered top discreetly conceal laundry, while the handles ensure easy movement around your home.

EFFICIENT EFFORTLESS ORGANIZATION: Ingeniously designed for seamless organization. Whether it’s sorting daily essentials, household items, or laundry, this multifunctional laundry hamper adapts to your storage needs beyond just the laundry room.

SPACIOUS STORAGE SOLUTION: With a total capacity of 100 Litres, this laundry bin offers generous space for your laundry - easily holding 2 to 4 full loads. Whether accommodating a large load or saving space when not in use, this feature ensures practicality and adaptability to your storage needs. Experience the perfect blend of spaciousness and convenience for a truly efficient and versatile organizational solution.

SEAMLESS REMOVABLE BAG: Featuring a removable and washable inner bag, this clothes basket ensures easy and convenient handling of your laundry. The removable bag allows you to effortlessly take out your clothes, making it a practical choice for transporting laundry to the washing machine. The washable inner bag also contributes to maintaining a clean and hygienic hamper.
